entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A significant source of oil, food, and fodder in India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where groundnut production and climate change impacts are studied.

entities.name: ARID AND SEMIARID AGRO-ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Marginal environments characterized by spatial variability of rainfall and soil where groundnut is grown.

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: A climatic factor whose variability affects groundnut yields.

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: A biophysical factor contributing to yield fluctuations in groundnut.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Predicted increase in rainfall variability that constrains groundnut economy and production.

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL AND SOCIOECONOMIC IMPACTS
entities.description: The combined effects of environmental and social factors on agriculture and food systems.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall output and economic activity related to groundnut cultivation.

entities.name: PRICES
entities.description: The market value of groundnut affected by climate and socioeconomic factors.

entities.name: RCP 8.5 SCENARIO
entities.description: A representative concentration pathway used to estimate biophysical impacts of climate change.

entities.name: POPULATION
entities.description: A socioeconomic factor influencing groundnut productivity.

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: A socioeconomic factor influencing groundnut productivity.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT YIELD
entities.description: The amount of groundnut produced per unit area, sensitive to climate and economic variables.

entities.name: ECONOMIC AND MARKET VARIABLES
entities.description: Factors including elasticities and trade that influence groundnut yields.
